title: Clinical and molecular findings in a cohort of ANO5-related myopathy.
author: Silva AMS Coimbra-Neto AR Souza PVS Winckler PB Goncalves MVM Cavalcanti EBU Carvalho AADS Sobreira CFDR Camelo CG Mendonca RDH Estephan EDP Reed UC Machado-Costa MC Dourado-Junior MET Pereira VC Cruzeiro MM Helito PVP Aivazoglou LU Camargo LVD Gomes HH Camargo AJSD Pinto WBVDR Badia BML Libardi LH Yanagiura MT Oliveira ASB Nucci A Saute JAM Franca-Junior MC Zanoteli E
content:
S-EPMC6649425 PMC6649425 Clinical and molecular findings in a cohort of ANO5-related myopathy.

Objective

ANO5-related myopathy is an important cause of limb-girdle muscular dystrophy (LGMD) and hyperCKemia. The main descriptions have emerged from European cohorts, and the burden
